reforms.description: Denmark is expanding its public support for business R&D through well-designed R&D grants and tax credits aimed at incremental R&D expenses, addressing the concentration of business R&D spending in a few large firms.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increases overall business R&D investment, fostering innovation and competitiveness among smaller firms.
reforms.status_evidence: The government plans to broaden public support to business R&D.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it aims to diversify R&D funding sources and stimulate innovation across a broader range of firms.
reforms.source_quote: Broaden public support to business R&D through well-designed R&D grants and tax credits for incremental R&D expenses.

reforms.description: The Danish government is investing in open access to public-sector basic data, including weather data, to foster innovation and research opportunities for businesses.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhances the availability of data for research and innovation, potentially leading to new services and business models.
reforms.status_evidence: The government aims to make more public data available to foster innovation.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative is important as it leverages existing public data to stimulate innovation and research, enhancing the overall innovation ecosystem.
reforms.source_quote: Recent digital initiatives by the Government aim at fostering further open access to public-sector basic data.

reforms.description: The Danish Government launched a 'Disruption Council' to analyze and discuss future challenges from technological changes and globalization, aiming to ensure that all Danes benefit from economic development.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The Council aims to harness technological changes for broad economic benefits, potentially enhancing productivity and innovation across sectors.
reforms.status_evidence: The Council was established and is actively functioning.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of the Council represents a significant step in coordinating responses to technological disruption, fostering collaboration among various stakeholders.
reforms.source_quote: In May 2017, the Danish Government established a 'Disruption Council', a partnership between the social partners, businesses, experts and the Government.

reforms.description: A business and entrepreneurship reform package was introduced, which includes a gradual increase in the tax deduction for R&D expenditures from 100% to 110% by 2026.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing the tax deduction for R&D expenditures incentivizes firms to invest more in research and development, which can enhance innovation and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The tax deduction increase was included in the business and entrepreneurship reform package.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it directly impacts the funding available for R&D activities, encouraging firms to enhance their innovative capabilities.
reforms.source_quote: Gradually increased tax deduction of R&D expenditures from 100% to reach 110% in 2026.

reforms.description: In 2018, Denmark approved a reform to simplify the public business promotion services system, enhancing support for startups and medium-term firm growth.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The reform aims to address market failures by providing better access to capital and guidance for startups, which can enhance innovation and firm growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform was approved and implemented to simplify the system.
reforms.importance_rationale: The simplification of the business promotion services is significant as it enhances the support structure for startups, which is crucial for fostering innovation and economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: In 2018, a welcome reform was approved to simplify the system significantly.

reforms.description: The Danish government is considering an allowance for corporate equity (ACE) to reduce the tax bias towards debt financing, which could stimulate investment and innovation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By reducing the tax bias against equity, the ACE could encourage more investment in innovative projects, thereby enhancing economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The Government has proposed the ACE as a reform to stimulate investment.
reforms.importance_rationale: The introduction of an ACE represents a significant shift in corporate tax policy that could fundamentally alter investment incentives and support innovation.
reforms.source_quote: A more fundamental reform to introduce an allowance for corporate equity (ACE) is currently being considered by the Government.

reforms.description: Denmark plans to simplify its existing range of business support schemes by merging the Market Development Fund with the Innovation Fund, aiming to enhance public support for innovation while maintaining expertise.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Simplifying support schemes is expected to improve access and effectiveness of public funding for innovation, particularly benefiting SMEs.
reforms.status_evidence: The merger of the Market Development Fund with the Innovation Fund has been finalized.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in the structure of public support for innovation, aiming to enhance efficiency and accessibility for businesses.
reforms.source_quote: A recent political agreement plans to simplify the existing range of business support schemes, which will merge the Market Development Fund with the Innovation Fund.

reforms.description: Denmark is set to increase R&D tax incentives by introducing an enhanced tax allowance for current R&D expenditure, gradually increasing from 1.5% in 2019 to 10% in 2026.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing tax incentives for R&D is expected to stimulate private sector investment in innovation, particularly benefiting young and innovative firms.
reforms.status_evidence: The enhanced tax allowance rate will gradually increase as planned.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is a significant adjustment to the existing tax incentive framework, aimed at increasing R&D investment in the private sector.
reforms.source_quote: Recent reform will increase R&D tax incentives by introducing enhanced tax allowance for current R&D expenditure.

reforms.description: In December 2017, Denmark launched a new research and innovation strategy aimed at strengthening research in technology and enhancing technology transfers from universities to businesses, including an inspection of existing efforts and legislation to remove barriers.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By improving technology transfer mechanisms, the reform is expected to enhance collaboration between universities and businesses, leading to increased commercialization of research outputs.
reforms.status_evidence: The strategy was launched with specific initiatives to strengthen technology transfers.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant effort to enhance the commercialization of research through improved technology transfer, which is crucial for innovation.
reforms.source_quote: In December 2017, a new research and innovation strategy was launched, including initiatives to strengthen research in technology and technology transfers from universities to business.

reforms.description: The 2018 Digital Growth reform package includes initiatives to strengthen cybersecurity in companies, establishing a single digital point of entry for reporting IT security incidents and launching a national strategy for cyber and information security.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing cybersecurity is expected to build trust in digital technologies, which is essential for their adoption and the overall productivity growth of firms.
reforms.status_evidence: The Government launched a national strategy for cyber and information security.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform addresses a critical area of concern for businesses, particularly small firms, and aims to enhance their resilience against cyber threats, which is vital for fostering innovation.
reforms.source_quote: The 2018 Digital Growth reform package contains a number of initiatives to strengthen cyber security in companies.

reforms.description: The Government has initiated a wide scale reflection on how to improve the education system and make it more relevant for the labour market by reforming the university funding system and better targeting labour market demand and future skill needs in education.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving the education system aligns skills with market demand, enhancing productivity and innovation potential.
reforms.status_evidence: An agreement was passed in December 2017 to reform university funding.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a structural change in how university funding is allocated, which is crucial for aligning education with future labor market needs.
reforms.source_quote: An agreement was passed in December 2017 to reform university funding based on quality and outcomes of students.

reforms.description: The Government launched a Technology Pact aiming to raise the number of STEM graduates in collaboration with companies, educational and research institutions.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing the number of STEM graduates will enhance the skill base necessary for innovation and technological advancement.
reforms.status_evidence: The Government launched a Technology Pact aiming to raise the number of STEM graduates.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative is significant in addressing skill shortages in STEM fields, which are critical for future innovation.
reforms.source_quote: In April 2018, the Government also launched a Technology Pact aiming to raise the number of STEM graduates in collaboration with companies.

reforms.description: The Danish government aims to improve collaboration between universities and businesses by simplifying the regulatory framework and enhancing intellectual property rights policies.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating collaboration is expected to enhance knowledge transfer and commercialization of research outputs.
reforms.status_evidence: The recommendation to improve collaboration between universities and businesses is emphasized in the survey.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it addresses barriers to collaboration, which is essential for enhancing innovation and economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: Improve collaboration between universities and businesses by reducing the complexity of the system regulating cooperation, and improving intellectual property right policies of universities.
